name: file-editor
description: Advanced LLM-powered file editing tool with search/replace patches, fuzzy matching, and atomic multi-file transactions with rollback
trait: Use file_edit to make surgical edits to files using natural language instructions — the tool generates search/replace patches via the LLM instead of rewriting entire files. Use file_edit_preview to see proposed changes without applying them. Use file_edit_apply_patch to apply raw search/replace patches directly. Use file_edit_transaction to perform atomic multi-file edits with automatic rollback on failure. Ideal for editing large files where rewriting the whole file is impractical or risky.
